mapper.select: SELECT co_id , store_id , schedule_date , open_status , schedule_priority , open_time , last_order_time , close_time , closed_reason_kor , closed_reason_en , closed_reason_jp , closed_reason_zh_cn , closed_reason_zh_tw , use_yn , sync_status , regr_id , reg_dttm , updt_id , updt_dttm FROM fscps.bs_airstar_store_schedule WHERE co_id = #{coId} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND schedule_date LIKE #{searchMonth} || '%' ORDER BY schedule_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fscps.bs_airstar_store_schedule ( co_id, store_id, schedule_date, open_status, schedule_priority, open_time, last_order_time, close_time, closed_reason_kor, closed_reason_en, closed_reason_jp, closed_reason_zh_cn, closed_reason_zh_tw, use_yn, sync_status, regr_id, reg_dttm ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{storeId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{openStatus}, #{schedulePriority}, #{openTime}, #{lastOrderTime}, #{closeTime}, COALESCE(#{closedReasonKor}, ''), COALESCE(#{closedReasonEn}, ''), #{closedReasonJp}, COALESCE(#{closedReasonZhCn}, ''), #{closedReasonZhTw}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{syncStatus}, 'C'), #{regrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
